name: claude-code-internals
description: Gives Claude source-level knowledge of its own architecture. 76 lessons covering every internal subsystem — hooks (all 27 event types), permissions (7-phase pipeline, 23 validators), boot sequence, agents, compaction (including marble-origami reversible collapse), MCP, memory, AskUserQuestion tool, and binary-verified new features through v2.1.109 (/recap on-demand session recap, multi-repo checkout, byte-level stream watchdog, REPL mode, managed-agents API beta, streaming partial yield protection, system prompt rename, proactive away summary, CLAUDE_CODE_CERT_STORE, dynamic loop pacing, cloud-first loops, /dream, Perforce mode, Script Caps).
